title: [BUG] Data validation list is absent for cell if source of values on another sheet
author: alinakuchai-ideals
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Data validation list is absent for cell if source of values on another sheet

Lib version: 4.4.0

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Create excel with two sheets
2. Fill cells with values on Sheet 1 (E67-E71)
3. On Sheet 2 add Data validation list for cell A1 with source of values from Sheet 1
4. Load file with workbook.xlsx.load

Actual result:
Workbook worksheet 'Sheet 2' doesn't contain dataValidation for cell A1

Expected result:
Workbook worksheet 'Sheet 2' contain dataValidation for cell A1 as
A1: {
formulae: ['=Sheet1!$E$67:$E$71'],
type: "list",
...
}

comments.author: jjanvier
comments.body: Same problem here. Did anyone find a way to solve this? @alinakuchaicorp did you fix the problem?

comments.author: deepfaith
comments.body: +1 I could not get source of list on another sheet
